texto: Love wasn't to be measured, much less restricted, by methodology. Love wasn't a method. Love was a faculty of the highest order, imagined or unimagined. Love wasn't an activity. Love was an experience. Love was the second coming of innocence.
explicacao: Citação de Rob Inclan sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Love wasn't to be measured, much less restricted, by methodology. Love wasn't a method. Love was …” articula amor, innocence, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como love.

frase_original: Love wasn't to be measured, much less restricted, by methodology. Love wasn't a method. Love was a faculty of the highest order, imagined or unimagined. Love wasn't an activity. Love was an experience. Love was the second coming of innocence.
